---
pagetitle: "Home"
html:
  code-fold: true
---

<style>
.column p { margin: 4pt 0; }

.headshot {
  width: 100%;
  aspect-ratio: 0.77/ 1 ;
  object-fit: cover;
  object-position: top;
  border-radius: 0%;
  display: block;
  margin-left: 8%;
}

.name-heading {
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin: 5% 0 10px 0;
}

.blurb {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #ddd;
}

.cv-icon-link {
  width: 80%;
  display: block;
  text-align: left;
  margin-top: 40%;
}

.cv-icon {
  width: 100%;
  object-fit: contain;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
}

.cv-icon-link:hover .cv-icon {
  opacity: 0.7;
}


.icon-row {
  display: flex;
  margin-top: 5%;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.icon-row img {
  margin-top: 5%;
  height: 75px;
  object-fit: contain;
  transition: opacity 0.2s;
  margin-left: 50px;
}

.icon-row a:hover img {
  opacity: 0.7;
}


</style>

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="22%"}
![](headshot.png){.headshot}
:::

::: {.column width="22%"}
<a href="CV/CV.pdf" target="_blank" class="cv-icon-link">
  <img src="Icons/cv_icon.png" alt="CV" class="cv-icon">
</a>

:::


::::

<div class="name-heading">KATINKA LENNEMANN</div>

<div class="blurb">
Working on building electrification and clean energy in San Mateo County (who knew HVAC technology could be fun!) A geek on systems change and diffusion of innovation. Check out my CV above; click on the icons below to explore my projects. 
</div>


<div class="icon-row">
  <a href="project_afmam/index.html">
    <img src="Icons/asean_icon.png" alt="ASEAN Project">
  </a>
  <a href="project_s2s/index.html">
    <img src="Icons/s2s_icon.png" alt="Seeds to Solutions Project">
  </a>
  <a href="project_ssc/index.html">
    <img src="Icons/chair_icon.png" alt="SUHSD Sustainability Committee">
  </a>
  <a href="project_chicago/index.html">
    <img src="Icons/chicago_icon.png" alt="Chicago Road Networks Paper">
  </a>
</div>
